MINISTRY OF HOME AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 6th January 1971 G.S.R. 43,—In exercise of the powers conferred by clause Cb) of section 2 of the State of Himachal Pradesh Act, 1970 (53 of 1970), the Central Government hereby appoints the 25th day of January, 1&71, as the appointed day for the purposes of that Act, [No. 10/49/70-SR,] M.
